name: Q-11 PR with full manifest, 5+ ADRs, no drift, and invocations logged scores 100/100 per §26
command: printf '%s' '{"commit":"abc","ai_involvement":{"models_used":["sonnet"]},"standards_state":{"g":1},"cost_telemetry":{"tokens_in":100},"decision_provenance":{"adrs":["ADR-1"]}}' > manifest.json && : > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1,ADR-2,ADR-3,ADR-4,ADR-5' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 3 --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.score===100?0:1)' && echo perfect 1>&2
